# Pull Request

## Description

Please include a summary of your changes. Include relevant motivation and context.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Specification update (SPEC.md)
- [ ] SDK feature (Python, TypeScript, or Go)
- [ ] SDK bug fix
- [ ] Circuit registry submission
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD or infrastructure
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Changes Made

-
-
-

## Testing

Describe the testing you performed:

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests passed
- [ ] Manual testing completed

**Test Details:**

## Specification Compliance

- [ ] Changes conform to SPEC.md
- [ ] No breaking changes (or major version bump justified)
- [ ] JSON Schema updated if applicable (§17)
- [ ] All spec sections (§2-§17) remain valid

## SDK Parity

If this PR adds or changes functionality across multiple SDKs:

- [ ] Python SDK updated (sdk/python)
- [ ] TypeScript SDK updated (sdk/typescript)
- [ ] Go SDK updated (sdk/go)
- [ ] Feature parity verified

If only one SDK is affected, explain why:

## Registry Updates

If adding or modifying circuits:

- [ ] Circuit JSON added to registry/circuits/
- [ ] Validates against registry/schema/circuit.schema.json
- [ ] registry.json index updated
- [ ] README.md reflects new circuit

## Documentation

- [ ] README.md updated if applicable
- [ ] SPEC.md updated if applicable
- [ ] Code comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Docstrings updated for public APIs

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have self-reviewed my changes
- [ ] I have commented my code where appropriate
- [ ] I have updated documentation as needed
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my changes work
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally
- [ ] Any dependent changes are merged and published

## Closes

Closes #(issue number)

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots here.
